name: SetControlVisibility
title: SetControlVisibility
syntax: void SetControlVisibility(char[] panel, char[] control, long visible);
description: Sets the visibility of all panel controls.
The panel is accessed by its individual panel name that is entered in the Panel Designer.

parameters.name: panel
parameters.description: Panel name, restricted to 128 characters."" – references all loaded panelsIf you open a panel the first time, the panel is loaded. If you close the panel, it remains loaded.

parameters.name: Note If you want to access all elements of a panel the notation "" is used, see example below.
visible
parameters.description: Sets if the panel element should be visible or not. visible = 1 => Panel element is visiblevisible = 0 => Panel element is not visible

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
